title: ConstitutionCheckResult
description: Structured output from a Constitution Steward audit. Captures evaluation of prompts, policies, schemas, docs, and workflows against the three constitutional laws: Reality, Selection, and Governed Recursion. The steward may propose amendments but cannot self-approve constitutional changes — human review is always required for amendment acceptance. See docs/ai-native/seed-constitution.md for the authoritative constitution and docs/ai-native/constitution-guard.md for the guard that validates constitution integrity.

checkId.description: Machine-readable idempotency marker for this check run (e.g. constitution-audit-wave32, constitution-guard-pre-merge).

checkType.description: Type of constitution check. full-audit = comprehensive review, targeted-audit = scoped to specific files or policies, pre-merge = before PR merge, pre-launch = before worker dispatch, amendment-review = evaluating a proposed amendment.

decision.description: Check outcome. pass = all laws satisfied. warn = advisory findings, no hard violations. block = constitutional violation found, action must not proceed without resolution.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the constitution check completed.

targetScope.description: Optional scope constraint for targeted audits.

files.description: Specific files evaluated in this check.

lawsEvaluated.description: Constitutional laws evaluated in this check. reality = does it match the real state? selection = is it the right choice? governed-recursion = does it follow recursion boundaries?

name.description: Machine-readable check name (e.g. seed-constitution-present, no-scope-expansion, human-boundary-respected).

law.description: Which constitutional law this check evaluates.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the check outcome.

source.description: Path or URL to the evidence source.

summary.description: One-line summary of what was found.

evidence.description: Evidence sources consulted for this check.

code.description: Machine-readable violation code (e.g. SCOPE_EXPANSION, HUMAN_BOUNDARY_BREACH, SELF_APPROVAL_ATTEMPT).

severity.description: Violation severity. error = blocks action. critical = security or governance breach requiring immediate human attention.

file.description: File path where the violation was found, if applicable.

violations.description: Hard constitutional violations that block the action.

law.description: Which constitutional law the warning relates to.

warnings.description: Advisory findings that do not block the action.

amendmentId.description: Unique identifier for this proposed amendment.

targetFile.description: File that would be modified if the amendment is accepted.

description.description: Description of the proposed change and why it is needed.

status.description: Amendment status. proposed = awaiting human review. accepted = human approved. rejected = human declined. superseded = replaced by a newer amendment.

justification.description: Why this amendment is needed, referencing the specific violation or gap.

proposedAmendments.description: Amendments proposed by the steward. The steward may propose but NEVER self-approve — all amendments require human review.

totalChecks.description: Total number of individual checks performed.

humanReviewRequired.description: True if any amendments are proposed or any critical violations exist. Always true when amendments are present — the steward cannot self-approve.
